name: Roadworks 2
short_description: City building real time strategy economy simulation game. Manage the resources on the map and build a city connected through road networks of different types of road so that you can meet production targets.
detailed_description:
City building real time strategy economy simulation game. Efficiently manage your city by setting up industries and houses.
Produce and transport enough resources in time while building a carefully planned road network.

Play against opponents online through Steam matchmaking by simultaneously building your cities and influencing each others' production power.

Includes 5 unlockable campaign levels where the game mechanics are explained.
